queue.title: Consolidate A prehook node subprocesses into single runner
queue.description: 35-a-session-prehook_A.sh averages 6234ms (maintain-audit WARN). Root cause: 5 separate node subprocess invocations (b-cost-trend.mjs, r-cost-monitor.mjs, hook-timing-report.mjs, stale-tag-remediate.mjs, audit-cost-escalation.mjs) each paying ~500-1000ms Node startup overhead. Create a single a-prehook-runner.mjs that imports all 5 modules and runs them in-process. Same pattern as session-context.mjs which replaced 7+ inline node -e calls. Expected: 60-80% wall time reduction.

Consider alternatives: inline test requirements in B sessions, smaller scope per directive, or different incentive structure.
